title: DFU - Three Easy Steps page - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to check DFU pop up
scenario: DFU "Three Easy Steps" page shows persistent popup when one earbud is disconnected and "Start Update" is tapped, then returns to Three Easy Steps after dismissing popup
steps: Connect a pair of Bluetooth earbuds (e.g., Poly Voyager Free 20)
Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update
Wait for the 'Three Easy Steps' page to appear
Disconnect one earbud (e.g., place the right earbud in the charge case)
Reconnect the earbud (remove it from the charge case)
Observe the screen returns to the 'Three Easy Steps' page
Repeat steps 6–12 for the left earbud disconnection scenario
expected: A popup appears: 'Update currently not available, please try back later'. Reconnecting the earbud keeps the popup visible. Tapping OK closes the popup and returns the user to the 'Three Easy Steps' page. This behavior is consistent for both right and left earbud disconnection.
